data.meter_type_description: Select 'Water' for a water meter or 'Electric' for an electricity meter. You can add both by setting up this integration twice.
data.base_url_description: The base URL of your Sensus Analytics portal.
data.unit_type_description: Display unit for usage. Water: 'gal' or 'CCF'. Electric: 'kWh'.
data.tier1_units_description: Maximum units in Tier 1. Leave blank if your utility has no tier limit.
data.tier1_price_description: Price per unit for Tier 1 usage.
data.tier2_units_description: Maximum units in Tier 2. Leave blank if not applicable.
data.tier2_price_description: Price per unit for Tier 2 usage.
data.tier3_price_description: Price per unit for Tier 3 usage.
data.service_fee_description: Fixed monthly charge from your utility regardless of usage.

error.auth: Authentication failed. Please check your username and password.
